stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The annex shows three distinct aerofoils named based on their design. Which type of aircraft would typically incorportate a wing with aerofoil NACA 64-206?

options.a: Slow- and medium-speed aeroplanes which require predictable handling characteristics across their speed range.
options.b: Aeroplanes that fly at supersonic speeds which require a very high MCRIT, while reducing the effects of shockwaves.
options.c: High-speed subsonic aeroplanes which require a high MCRIT, while preserving good low-speed handling qualities.
options.d: Training aeroplanes that should possess good low-speed handling and must have easily manageable stall characteristics.
